message:
fix(codegen): Add unique block IDs for os.path operations

Nested os.path operations (e.g., os.path.dirname(os.path.dirname(x)))
were generating duplicate block labels, causing Zig compilation errors.

Changes:
- Add general_block_id counter to NativeCodegen
- Add emitUniqueBlockLabel() and emitBreakToBlock() helpers
- Refactor pathBlock() and osSwitch() to use unique IDs
- Update genPathSplit() to use helpers

Result: Nested os.path calls now compile correctly with unique labels
(os_path_dirname_blk_0, os_path_dirname_blk_1, etc.)
